system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee or Medium Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 6

This attack was developed by Lady White Blade and is one of her more feared Techniques. The attacker charges with a sword at an opponent, delivering a thrust and cut so extreme it can create an opening for the attacker to pass through as it rips the victim asunder. On a success, this does 3 Extra Wounds to the target in addition to a regular Damage roll. If the Attack kills the target, it rips him apart allowing you to pass through his body as bursts in a terrible display. It requires a reckless charge imposing a -3 to your Evade and Parry for the round plus you must move 20 feet in straight line toward the target. Cathartic: This does 8 Extra Wounds to the target in addition to regular Damage roll.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.activationSkill: Light Melee or Medium Melee against Parry
system.requirementNotes: You must move 20 feet in straight line toward the target.
system.catharticEffect: This does 8 Extra Wounds to the target in addition to regular Damage roll.
